method: Cross-reference STATE.md claims against newer authority docs (VERIFICATION.md 2026-05-03, STATUS.md, EIGHT_LAWS.md), live gh api repo state, and tonight's perplexity-research reorg work.

findings.claim: The four principles come from Ray Dalio — directly. Radical Honesty. Radical Transparency. We added Radical Attribution and Win-Win / Idea Meritocracy.
findings.current_reality: clean-build/00_authority/EIGHT_LAWS.md exists (3002 bytes, sha 43a4043) and is referenced as canonical layer-0 by ground-truth/OPENCLAW.md and corpus-raw/ewan-map. STATE.md's four-principle framing does not acknowledge or reconcile.

findings.claim: The decision was made to replace FalkorDB with Neo4j 5.26+, keep Graphiti as the knowledge extraction framework, and keep Qdrant for vectors while a migration plan is worked through.
findings.current_reality: VERIFICATION.md (2 days later, SSH-verified) reports FalkorDB as 'Running and populated' with 8,841 nodes across 2 active graphs. Migration not done; FalkorDB still primary.

findings.claim: Byker is the codename for the production system now running on Railway. It is working.
findings.current_reality: byker-production repo last commit 22ff950 dated 2026-02-07 (87 days before STATE.md was written). VERIFICATION.md flags byker-production as 'dormant / to decide' with question 'still relevant?'.

findings.claim: FalkorDB ... 9,000 nodes across 4 graphs: business_knowledge ... amplified ... amplified_brain / amplified_graph — scaffolded, empty.
findings.current_reality: VERIFICATION.md:45 reports 8,841 nodes across 2 active graphs. Two scaffolded-empty graphs no longer counted. Drift of 159 nodes.

findings.claim: 35+ containers total on Docker network amplified-net.
findings.current_reality: Two newer authoritative sources disagree both with STATE.md and with each other. clean-build/STATUS.md v2 (2026-04-30): 40 containers (37 running, 1 paused, 2 stopped). VERIFICATION.md (2026-05-03): 37 Docker containers running. STATE.md '35+' is now misleading lower bound.

findings.claim: Vault backup risk — /opt/amplified/vault/ still needs confirmed git remote sync.
findings.current_reality: Amplified-Partners/vault repo had 5-week dormancy gap (last commit before tonight: 2026-03-28). Tonight (2026-05-05 02:14-02:19 UTC) it received Dependabot + Copilot config commits. Repo is active. NOT CHECKED whether Beast /opt/amplified/vault/ actually pushes to it. STATE.md flag still un-resolved per any newer doc.
sources: Amplified-Partners/vault commit history c65b874, f5d7cdc, c0fb940

findings.current_reality: NOT CHECKED. Cannot verify SSH key state from outside the Beast. VERIFICATION.md:5 confirms key worked 2-3 May 2026.

findings.claim: CRM live with Dave Jesmond — Close to live. CRM working, persistence solid, API auth in place.
findings.current_reality: VERIFICATION.md:203 lists 'First client live — Dave Jesmond / Jesmond Plumbing. CRM is ready. What's between here and live?' as still-open decision. No reported movement across 3 days.

STATE.md last touched 2026-05-01 19:41 UTC. 78 hours elapsed. In that window: VERIFICATION.md created (2026-05-03), 5 Devin sessions ran, 7 dedup PRs merged (181 files / 41,581 lines deleted), perplexity-research repo created (2026-05-04), 9 PRs opened in perplexity-research, 4 reorganisation plans drafted by 4 agents, spine-blanks audit ran (59 gaps found in clean-build).

Zero references to: perplexity-research repo, 2026-05-04 reorg, 4-plan parallel build, Antigravity/Mirror/Cassian/Sam agent identities, spine-blanks audit, substrate diversity question, or VERIFICATION.md itself. Current Priorities dashboard at top is most-updated and most-stale section.

findings.claim: Bob ... Running but cold. The Marketing Suite ... Spec exists, partial code.
findings.current_reality: VERIFICATION.md:42 (2026-05-03): Marketing Engine 'Running but daily cron broken (quote escaping bug — fixable in 10 minutes)'. Marketing further along than 'spec + partial code' — running on Beast cron, just bug-blocked.

findings.claim: Hetzner AX162-R 135.181.161.131, hostname amplified-core ... 256GB DDR5 RAM
findings.current_reality: ground-truth INFRASTRUCTURE.md was corrected on 2026-05-03 (commit 035df63: 'fix: correct RAM spec to 256 GB DDR5 (hardware spec, not usable after kernel)'). STATE.md does not flag the kernel-usable distinction other docs absorbed.

findings.claim: 10-agent marketing swarm scaffolded (Unit Gamma in clean-build)
findings.current_reality: NOT CHECKED. Unit Gamma not mentioned in VERIFICATION.md.

clean-build/00_authority/SIGNATURES.md mandates session-ID signing on every authority commit. Commit 220cf72 signs in footer text but git author is devin-ai-integration[bot], not a named human. Authority spine signature standard met in body but not via git identity.

what_i_did_not_audit: clean-build/STATUS.md cross-checked against live Beast container state (need SSH; out of lane)
ground-truth/AGENTS.md agent-routing model vs actual agents who pushed PRs tonight
